name: Storage account allows public blob access
description: The storage account has AllowBlobPublicAccess enabled, allowing containers and blobs to be made publicly accessible. This is a leading cause of accidental data exposure in Azure environments.
remediation: Set AllowBlobPublicAccess=false at the account level: az storage account update --allow-blob-public-access false. Enforce via Azure Policy ('Storage account public access should be disallowed'). Review existing public containers and revoke anonymous access.
